design_philosophy.core_concept: High-fashion meets digital ownership. Think iridescent foils, milled aluminum, and frosted glass in a brightly lit studio.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Light Mode Web3. High-key lighting, pastel neons, aggressive glassmorphism, and bold editorial typography.

usage_rules: Use 'Syne' for all major headings (H1-H3) to give that 'art-house' feel.
Use 'Manrope' for all UI text, inputs, and long-form content.
Headings should often have a subtle gradient text fill (e.g., Pink to Violet).

gradients.brand_text: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 via-purple-500 to-cyan-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent
gradients.glass_surface: bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/50 shadow-xl shadow-pink-500/5
gradients.button_primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-500 to-violet-600 hover:from-pink-600 hover:to-violet-700 text-white shadow-lg shadow-pink-500/25

grid_system.landing: Grid Mode A (Tetris): Asymmetrical bento grid for showcasing top contestants.
grid_system.dashboard: Grid Mode B (High Density): Clean 4-column grid for stats and management.

buttons.primary: h-12 px-8 rounded-full font-bold tracking-wide transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: h-12 px-8 rounded-full bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 font-semibold

cards.contestant: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-pink-500/10 transition-all duration-500 border border-slate-100

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-xl bg-white/50 border-slate-200 focus:border-pink-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-500/20 transition-all backdrop-blur-sm

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: HEAVY usage. The UI should feel like layers of frosted glass floating over a dynamic background.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows are mandatory. Do not use black shadows. Use `shadow-pink-500/10` or `shadow-cyan-500/10`.
decorations: Floating 3D orbs in the background (CSS radial gradients or Spline).
Noise texture overlays at 2% opacity to reduce digital flatness.

transitions.page_load: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}

motion.micro_interactions: Buttons should have a 'jelly' effect on click. Cards should lift and glow on hover.

universal_guidelines: LIGHT THEME ONLY. Do not create a dark mode toggle. The brand is strictly 'Daylight Glamour'.
Avoid pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0F172A) for maximum contrast text.
Every interactive element must have a `data-testid`.
Do not use default browser scrollbars. Style them to be thin and pill-shaped.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-energy, visual-first voting platform. Your priority is VISUAL IMPACT. The 'Voting' action must feel rewarding (confetti, sound, haptics visual). The Leaderboard must look like a stock market ticker but for beauty—dynamic, shifting, and alive. Use the provided image URLs for the MVP. Do not use placeholders.
